ops.title: cc-notes MCP server: full tool surface, plugin wiring, liveness marker

ops.text: cc-notes mcp serves ~60 tools over stdio via the official go-sdk, driving the cobra tree in-process with --json
plugin/.mcp.json wires the server; liveness marker written/removed/swept under <git-common-dir>/cc-notes/mcp/
in-memory transport tests cover doc_add→doc_show, task lifecycle, error labeling; scripted stdio session passes
